name: openoutreach_prompts
description: Reusable prompt pack derived from the openoutreach capability.

prompts.name: lead_generation_prompt
prompts.template: Find leads related to the following target market: {target_market_description} and product: {product_description}.
prompts.use_case: Sales teams generating targeted B2B leads on LinkedIn.

prompts.name: outreach_message_prompt
prompts.template: Generate a personalized LinkedIn connection request message for a lead in {industry} introducing our product: {product_description}.
prompts.use_case: Marketing professionals automating personalized outreach campaigns.
